title: INIT-2.2.4 — Proof Freshness Enforcement

sha_binding.verified_source_note: Branch HEAD before merge — merge SHA will be bound post-squash

r_level_check.note: No R-level artifacts required for this diff

invariants_asserted: Fresh bundle (within window) → valid=true, fresh=true, no failures
Stale bundle (ageMs >= windowMs) → stale-bundle failure — boundary >= semantics enforced
Future createdAt → future-created-at failure (clock skew / tampered)
AuditEvent emitted on every check (pass and fail)
FRESHNESS_WINDOWS_MS: t1=24h, governance=7d, t2=7d, t3=30d, certification=90d
checkBundleFreshness reads createdAt from bundle object
checkBundleFreshness propagates bundle.id as bundleId context
requireFreshProof returns FreshnessResult for fresh bundle
requireFreshProof throws ProofFreshnessGateError for stale bundle
No I/O, Supabase, or HTTP — pure freshness logic
